conservative.name: Dangerous When Cornered
conservative.requirements:
Used By: Swarms
Engaged with 2 or more enemies

success.description: When the swarm senses it is surrounded, it struggles furiously to escape. The more enemies it is facing, the more vicious its attacks become. The attack inflicts normal damage
The attack inflicts critical damage, and the attacker may immediately perform a manoeuvre

boon.description: The attacker may immediately disengage for free

bane.description: The attacker gains the Overwhelmed condition for 2 rounds

reckless.name: Dangerous When Cornered
reckless.requirements:
Used By: Boar, Giant Wolf
Engaged with 2 or more enemies

success.description: When the creature senses it is surrounded, it struggles furiously to escape. The more enemies it is facing, the more vicious it becomes. The attack inflicts normal damage
The attack inflicts critical damage, and the attacker may immediately perform a manoeuvre

boon.description: The attacker may immediately move from engaged to close range without suffering any fatigue

bane.description: The attacker gains the Overwhelmed condition for 2 rounds
